_note: Updated daily at noon by the analytics agent. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Track whether the AI's room suggestions are actually helpful — accept, tweak, or reject
priorities.note: We can count how many times the AI is asked to generate a room, but we have no way to tell if the result was good. Until we can see whether designers accept, adjust, or throw away those suggestions, we're flying blind on quality.
priorities.proposed_solution: Add Copilot outcome events (accept, tweak, reject) to the tracking plan and report them with explicit denominators and confidence context.

priorities.title: Measure the one number that matters most: how many finished rooms each user produces per month
priorities.note: There are no external users yet, so this number would be zero. We'll start tracking it properly at the first public release.
priorities.proposed_solution: Define and instrument rooms exported per active user per month as the north star starting at the first public release.

priorities.title: Automate the daily dashboard refresh so it runs without anyone pressing a button
priorities.note: The automated system went live today. Every dashboard — including this one — now updates itself each day at noon. No manual work required.
priorities.proposed_solution: Keep verifying the daily automated dashboard refresh and extend the runbook when new metrics or pages are added.

priorities.title: Write clear privacy notices before we start tracking individual user behaviour
priorities.note: We can't track what specific people do until we tell them we're doing it and get their agreement. Legal needs to sign off first. On hold until that conversation happens.
priorities.proposed_solution: Partner with Legal on consent copy and lawful basis, then enable individual-level tracking only after disclosure is approved.

priorities.title: Choose a privacy-respecting analytics service for when the tool goes public
priorities.note: Not needed before launch. We'll revisit this when the first external release is close.
priorities.proposed_solution: Before launch, shortlist a privacy-respecting analytics vendor and fold it into the tracking plan with Legal sign-off.

actions.name: Metric Audit
actions.description: Review what is measured, what is missing, and what has misleading denominators — with sample sizes stated.

actions.name: Funnel Report
actions.description: Activation funnel snapshot (open → first entity placed → first export) with denominators and confidence context.

actions.name: Competitive Scan
actions.description: Structured competitor intelligence report: new entrants, community sentiment shifts, AI tool developments.
actions.trigger: Quarterly or when a new entrant is spotted

actions.name: Copilot Eval Report
actions.description: Acceptance, revision, and discard rates with credible intervals — never point estimates without denominators.
actions.trigger: After any model version or prompt architecture change
